message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceDiagram

participant service process as ServiceProcess
participant client process as ClientProcess

note right of ClientProcess
  DBusProxy
end note

note right of ServiceProcess
  ConcreteImpl
  DBusAdapter
end note

ServiceProcess->>DBus: Init(ConcreteImpl)
DBus-->>ServiceProcess: Export

ClientProcess->>DBus: ConnectToRemoteObject
DBus-->>ClientProcess: GetAllProperties

ServiceProcess->>DBus: GetAllProperties
DBus-->>ServiceProcess: return properties

ServiceProcess-->>ClientProcess: return properties

ClientProcess->>DBusProxy: Init
DBusProxy-->>ClientProcess: Try to fetch all properties including "ready" property

@enduml
